title: Spatial Search
subtitle: Spatial Search by Discrete-time Quantum Walk
description: Demonstrates a discrete-time flip-flop quantum-walk search algorithm on a two-dimensional square lattice. The notebook defines the position and coin Hilbert spaces, prepares a uniform superposition over lattice vertices and coin directions, applies a marked-vertex oracle, a Grover coin, and a flip-flop shift operator, and compares the resulting target-site probability and full position probability distribution with a direct statevector simulation. Both periodic and non-periodic boundary conditions are considered.
